Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: The season-ending "Family Show" features the best variety show ensemble on television.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Who loves ya, Carol? Guest star Telly Savalas, that's who!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Telly Savalas, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Kenneth Mars & John Byner star! Includes Carol as a soap opera fanatic, Kenneth's coaching, and dreams.
Video.title: Kenneth Mars, John Byner

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Guest James Coco takes a slow boat to romance in the Saturday Night Tearjerker movie spoof, "One Way Ticket."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: James Coco, Pointer Sister

Video.summary: A meeting between incoming and outgoing First Ladies, an awkward audition, and the movie spoof "Kids Town."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: "The Family" steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a fancy restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Harvey and Tim are tipsy friends coming home from a night of carousing, plus a spoof of The Arabian Nights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers browsing waterbeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Mama Cass Elliot and Ken Berry offer up some musical numbers and a series of commercial parodies.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Don Adams guest stars. Don plays a talk show host, Carol's husband in "The Lost Purse," and a griping father.
Video.title: Don Adams

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Tim Conway star. Features spoof "The Dater's Game", and Tim as a service station attendant.
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role..
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Cher stars! Includes Harvey and Tom as dueling pianists, commercial spoofs, and a love triangle.
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Paul Sand & Eydie Gorme guest. Includes salute to series like "Dr. Kildaire", and Paul & Eydie join a sketch.
Video.title: Paul Sand, Eydie Gorrme

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features Ruth Buzzi & Richard Crenna, who appear in a salute to "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers, steals scenes as an extra, and steals a mint.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mr. Steve Lawrence joins Carol in a sketch about a traveling couple sharing some honesty with each other.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Features a take-off of the classic film "National Velvet", and a sketch with Carol & Harvey as a couple.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: John Byner & Petula Clark star. TV commercial spoofs and the firing of Donald Duck are on tap tonight.
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Guest Andy Griffith appears in "Mr. Law & Order." On "Carol & Sis", Roger leaves Carol a football widow.
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray join commercial outtakes! "Carol & Sis" finds Carol filling in for a secretary.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca appear in a fairy tale musical--the story of Cinderrumplewhite.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet
